response.justification: Strong staff-level engineer with 20+ years experience and recent active involvement in AI infrastructure and MCP at re:cinq. However, the role requires minimum 8 years building production-grade AI solutions with demonstrated Python expertise, vector databases, RAG architectures, and multi-agent frameworks. The candidate's resume shows TypeScript/JavaScript focus with no explicit Python experience, and current AI work (1 year, infrastructure-focused) falls short of the 8-year AI production systems requirement. Technical foundation is solid but AI specialization is insufficient.
strengths: Staff-level engineer with 20+ years experience and current active role in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Strong TypeScript expertise and proven cloud infrastructure experience (AWS CDK at Optilyz, microservices architecture at Dunnhumby)
Demonstrated ability to lead complex technical projects and mentor teams across multiple full-stack domains
concerns: No explicit Python experience despite job requiring 8+ years developing AI solutions in Python—resume emphasizes TypeScript, JavaScript, and other languages
Limited evidence of production AI systems development; current AI role focuses on infrastructure tooling rather than core AI system design, data pipelines, or model optimization
No demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI) mentioned as required or preferred qualifications

key_factors.factor: Current MCP and AI infrastructure role
